summary: Successfully implemented post-tick hook system with idempotent writer for relationship intelligence promotion pipeline. Created complete integration with meeting pipeline that processes intelligence candidates through promotion gate and writes approved items to semantic memory and graph with full idempotency, error recovery, and manifest state tracking.
learnings: Post-tick hooks require careful integration without modifying core meeting pipeline - wrapper pattern works well
Idempotency is critical for promotion processing - meetings may be re-run and writes must not duplicate
Single writer path prevents split-brain writes between semantic memory and graph systems
Manifest state tracking provides clean audit trail of promotion pipeline execution
Error recovery must be non-fatal to meeting pipeline - promotion is enhancement, not requirement
SQLite provides lightweight yet robust state management for promotion runs and write tracking
CLI interface enables both batch processing and individual meeting debugging
Dry-run mode is essential for testing promotion logic without side effects
